other_observers: Joey Kellner, Dick Schottler, Dick Prickett, Charlie Lawrence, Lisa Edwards, Dan Brooke and Cheryl Teuton
description: Bird observed through binoculars at this distance looked smaller and darker than nearby Marbled Godwits. After looking through a scope the bird had heavily barred undertail coverts, orange-brown chest and flanks. Mottled back, Bicolored upturned bill. Prominent white supercilium on grayish head. Very dark underwing coverts and axillaries contrasting with lighter secondaries and primary feathers. Bird was feeding near a water edge, hunched over with head almost all the way at water level. Feeding with Marbled Godwits, American Avocet and other nearby shorebirds.
photographer: Photographer: Dean Shoup, Joey Kellner, Joey Kellner, Dean Shoup
